{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Ornheim golem
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Ornheim golem]] is animated and controlled by a carved gem called a heartstone.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|An [[Ornheim golem]] can be destroyed by brute force if its body is broken.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
